title: Hospitals and universities repurposing drugs at 90% lower cost
content: Hospitals and universities are finding ways to repurpose existing drugs at significantly reduced costs, achieving savings of approximately 90% compared to standard pricing. This practice involves identifying new therapeutic uses for medications that are already approved and available, rather than developing entirely new pharmaceuticals. The discussion originated from a Hacker News thread, indicating interest within the technology and science communities about more affordable healthcare solutions through drug repurposing.

title: ChatGPT Plus 续费失败后，整理一下我试过的几种方式
content:
最近给 ChatGPT Plus 续费折腾了一圈，主要是卡被拒、支付失败、风控这些问题。 我试过的大概有几种：

自己绑卡：最省事，但不稳定，容易被拒。
找朋友海外卡帮忙：靠谱但麻烦，也不好每个月都麻烦别人。
虚拟卡：看平台，有些需要充值余额，成本和风控都要自己判断。
代充：省事…

title: 突发，Transformer之父告别谷歌，转投OpenAI
content: Noam Shazeer, a founding author of the 2017 Transformer paper "Attention Is All You Need," has joined OpenAI as Head of Architecture Research. Shazeer designed core innovations including multi-head attention and contributed to MoE, T5, and LaMDA. Google previously paid $2.7 billion to reacquire him through Character.AI in 2024, where he helped lead Gemini development. His departure to OpenAI follows fellow Transformer co-author Lukasz Kaiser, who joined in 2020 and led o1 and o3 development. OpenAI now employs two of the eight original Transformer authors as it pursues next-generation AI architectures beyond Transformers toward AGI.

title: 制造业AI落地，海尔智家先做了一个企业Agent OS
content: Haier Smart Home developed "Zhixiaoneng," an enterprise Agent OS that serves as a unified AI entry point for employees across 70+ business scenarios spanning R&D, production, supply chain, sales, and service. The platform enables staff to query orders, analyze inventory, generate business reports, and build applications without coding through a "citizen developer" approach. Key results include 20.7% faster R&D efficiency, 10% procurement cost reduction, and 99.5% problem resolution rate for 30,000 field staff. Co-built with Tencent Cloud, the system emphasizes security controls, permission-based API access, and human oversight for critical decisions.

title: Local Qwen isn't a worse Opus, it's a different tool
content: Local Qwen and Opus serve distinct purposes rather than competing directly. Running Qwen locally offers privacy, offline access, and cost control benefits that cloud-based Opus cannot match, while Opus excels at tasks requiring maximum capability regardless of infrastructure constraints. The comparison misunderstands their fundamentally different value propositions for users with varying needs.

title: 常识必胜
content: Value investors believe undervalued stocks will rise and overvalued ones will fall, like gravity. Yet markets can defy this long-term—currently high-dividend stocks fall despite strong earnings, while overvalued stocks rise, driven by persistent buying or selling forces. Still, fundamental principles prevail eventually; even planes must land to refuel. The author concludes that investing success rests not on complexity, but on trusting that common sense ultimately wins.

title: 多品牌婴幼儿纸尿裤被检出有毒物质「甲酰胺」，什么是甲酰胺？会对婴幼儿健康有哪些危害？
content: Multiple brands of infant diapers, including Huggies, Beaba, and Babycare, have been found to contain formamide, a toxic chemical classified as a reproductive toxicant. Testing commissioned by Economic Information Daily detected the substance in diaper samples, while medical institutions also found it in infants' blood and urine. A reporter's blood formamide levels nearly doubled after wearing a diaper overnight. Formamide, banned in cosmetics in China, can cause reproductive system damage and chronic liver and kidney injury through skin absorption and long-term accumulation. Despite consumer complaints of diaper rash and irritation, brands claim compliance with national standards, though comprehensive testing data remains unavailable. Current national standards are considered inadequate for this risk.

title: 最近面试，已经明显能感觉到行业不行了。
content: The tech job market has deteriorated noticeably. Interview candidates now mostly have months-long employment gaps, unlike the previously confident employed applicants. Even skilled workers voluntarily offer pay cuts. Layoffs and company closures dominate departure reasons. Long-term wage stagnation is common, with some forced to accept reduced salaries. Some employers now believe AI enables cheaper new graduates to replace experienced staff. The era of job-hopping for raises has ended as the industry aggressively pivots toward AI integration.

title: 12306要忙着赚钱了
content: Chinese regulators have summoned seven major online travel platforms over improper practices in train ticket sales, including false claims about priority booking, manipulative upselling, and excessive data collection. The crackdown threatens OTA platforms' business model of using low-margin rail tickets as a traffic driver to divert users toward higher-profit hotel and travel bookings. Meanwhile, official railway platform 12306 is expanding into hospitality services, leveraging its massive user base, high trust, and low customer acquisition costs. This shift pressures OTAs to reduce reliance on rail traffic and improve core competitiveness in travel products and user experience.

title: SpaceX吞下Cursor，马斯克狂补Coding：AI大战新重点定了
content: SpaceX acquired AI coding startup Cursor for $600 billion, marking a major move to complete Elon Musk's AI ecosystem. Cursor, the first truly AI-native code editor, enables natural language programming across multiple files and has become essential enterprise software infrastructure. The acquisition highlights AI coding's strategic importance as the bridge between natural language and executable digital actions—serving as a foundation for AI agents to operate in real-world scenarios. Concerns arise about Cursor's future neutrality and openness under SpaceX ownership. Chinese firms see opportunity in building localized, secure AI coding alternatives tailored to domestic enterprise needs for compliance, privacy, and legacy system integration.

title: 沃什上任后首次议息会议，美联储如期「按兵不动」，议息声明大修改，怎样解读？
content: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at 3.5%-3.75% in Chair Warsh's first meeting, with unanimous approval for the first time since 2025. Warsh significantly restructured the policy statement: leading with the rate decision, shortening the text, and removing forward guidance on monetary policy stance. The statement cited elevated uncertainty from Middle East conflicts but noted robust economic expansion, while acknowledging above-target inflation driven partly by energy supply shocks. The dot plot shifted sharply hawkish: nine officials projected rate hikes this year versus one for cuts, compared to March's twelve for cuts. The Fed lowered its 2026 GDP forecast to 2.2% and raised PCE inflation to 3.6%.

content: ByteDance is shifting AI resources from its consumer product Doubao to enterprise services. Doubao has over 200 million daily active users but generates under 10 million yuan daily, mainly from e-commerce commissions, while costing tens of millions in daily computing expenses. Enterprise service Seedance generates about $2 billion annualized revenue, covering Doubao's computing costs. This reflects an industry shift from user-scale-driven to enterprise-payment and computing-efficiency-driven AI commercialization.

title: 苹果计划 2027 年将推出带摄像头 AirPods 与新一代折叠 iPhone
content: Apple plans to launch camera-equipped AirPods, a foldable iPhone, and a commemorative iPhone by late 2027. The AirPods will be Apple's first AI-focused wearable, featuring computer vision cameras to provide real-world visual data for Siri. The company is also developing advanced process chips and aims to release its first smart glasses as early as late next year.

title: 2025 年 OpenAI 净亏损约 80 亿美元
content: OpenAI's 2025 revenue reached $13.07 billion with significant year-over-year growth. The company reported operating losses of $20.92 billion, driven by $19.18 billion in R&D (including $10.59 billion to Microsoft), $7.5 billion in production and distribution, and $5.73 billion in sales and marketing. Net losses neared $39 billion, or approximately $8 billion excluding roughly $30 billion in accounting expenses related to nonprofit-to-profit restructuring. ChatGPT exceeded 900 million weekly active users with 50 million paying subscribers.

title: Sensor Tower 报告：ChatGPT 市场份额首度跌破 50%，AI 助手竞争加剧
content: Sensor Tower's 2026 AI report shows ChatGPT's market share falling below 50% for the first time to 46.4%, while Gemini rose to 27.7% and Claude to 10.3%. ChatGPT leads with over 1.1 billion monthly active users, followed by Gemini at 662 million and Claude at 245 million. Global AI app downloads are projected to reach nearly 2.3 billion in the first half of 2026, with user spending exceeding $4.2 billion. Asia saw its first quarterly download decline of 3.3% in Q1 2026.

title: 山姆会员商店首席采购官张青已提交辞呈

Walmart China thanked Zhang for her contributions and is searching globally for a successor. Neil Maffey, a former Sam's Club CMO, will serve as interim chief merchandising officer during the transition, continuing business planning and member-focused merchandising strategies.

title: 智谱：上线并开源 GLM-5.2
content: Zhipu has released and open-sourced GLM-5.2, which ranks first among globally available models on Code Arena, a frontend development evaluation system with one million users. The model features a 1M context window, enhanced coding capabilities, and infrastructure optimization for domestic computing platforms. It is released under the MIT license without geographic restrictions.

title: Getting more from each token: How Copilot improves context handling and model routing
content: GitHub Copilot is improving efficiency through two main approaches: smarter context handling and automatic model selection. For context, VS Code now uses prompt caching to reuse repeated information and tool search to load tool definitions on demand rather than sending all schemas every turn. For model routing, Auto combines real-time model health data with a task-aware routing system called HyDRA to match tasks to appropriate models rather than defaulting to the largest one. Auto routes at cache-friendly boundaries to maintain efficiency and works across 16 language families. The feature is expanding across Copilot surfaces including CLI and additional IDEs, with admin controls for organizational defaults.

title: claude code 实践心得：飘才是最大的敌人
content: The author codes entirely with Claude Code and has tested multi-agent frameworks, finding them overhyped. These tools promise autonomous robot teams but produce superficial UIs with broken internals. Programmers distrust such opacity—similar to failed low-code platforms—because they ultimately must fix bugs themselves. The core problem is model "drift": like a game of telephone, errors compound across agent chains, with single-agent tasks drifting slightly and multi-agent pipelines diverging massively from original intentions.

title: 字节跳动加量采购国产芯片
content: ByteDance is in discussions with domestic chipmaker Tianshu Zhixin to purchase at least 50,000 AI chips for large model inference workloads. If completed, Tianshu Zhixin would become ByteDance's third GPU supplier. The move reflects broader trends among Chinese tech giants to accelerate domestic computing infrastructure and reduce reliance on foreign semiconductors amid ongoing supply constraints.

title: Volkswagen started blocking GrapheneOS users
content: Volkswagen began blocking users of GrapheneOS, a privacy-focused mobile operating system, from accessing its digital services. This restriction prevents GrapheneOS users from using Volkswagen's app-based features and connected car functionality. The move was discussed on Hacker News, though Volkswagen has not publicly explained its rationale for the block.

title: Why thinking out loud with someone beats thinking alone
content: Verbalizing thoughts with another person improves reasoning compared to solitary thinking. External dialogue forces clearer articulation, surfaces hidden assumptions, and enables real-time feedback. Partners can spot logical gaps, offer alternative perspectives, and ask clarifying questions that push deeper analysis. Social accountability reduces cognitive shortcuts and motivated reasoning. Even passive listeners help, though engaged collaborators yield stronger results. The dynamic mirrors rubber-duck debugging and Socratic methods, where externalization itself sharpens thinking.

US tech giants fell while semiconductor and hardware sectors rose, illustrating a global K-shaped market divergence. Capital rotates toward high-growth hard tech—AI computing, advanced chips, domestic substitution—driven by infrastructure spending and policy support. Traditional sectors lacking innovation face persistent decline as funds exit. This structural split reflects a fundamental economic transition from carbon-based to silicon-based industries. Sector selection now outweighs market timing for investors navigating this bifurcated landscape.
